run_summary.summary: One update: Liz followed up with the Linkind agency today asking for concept approval status. She mentioned the lights arrived yesterday and she's ready to film — just waiting on their green light. The Flexsteel thread is unchanged since last run (store visit still Thu Apr 23, 11:30am–12pm at Steinhafels Downers Grove).

suggestions.message: Store visit is THIS Thursday (Apr 23) at 11:30am–12pm at Steinhafels Downers Grove. Worth confirming the Popfly support ticket was actually submitted Tuesday before you head over.

Liz already nudged the agency today — lights are in hand and she's raring to go. If no concept approval comes back by Thursday (Apr 23), one more nudge is warranted. Any delay now is entirely on the brand side.

deals.next_action: Wait for concept approval from agency; follow up if no response by Apr 23
deals.notes: [Apr 21]: Liz followed up with agency asking for any update on concept approval — noted lights arrived Apr 20 and she's ready to film. [Apr 20]: Brand (relayed via agency) asked for time breakdown to confirm lights get majority screen time. Liz clarified her 'Top 3 Spring Porch Refresh Tips' concept: lights are Tip #1, plan includes assembling lights, app screen recordings, day & night shots, and key features walkthrough — lights featured 50%+ of video.
deals.activity_note: Apr 21: Liz followed up with agency — product arrived Apr 20, ready to film, awaiting concept approval
